import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''$REPO''\)
errors = []

tests = [
    \(''sandbox_runner'', ''from prediction_agent.evolution.sandbox_runner import run_tool_in_sandbox, SandboxResult''\),
    \(''tool_verifier'', ''from prediction_agent.evolution.tool_verifier import verify_tool, _check_ast, _BLOCKED_DUNDERS''\),
    \(''correlation_pruner'', ''from prediction_agent.evolution.correlation_pruner import check_correlation, PruningResult''\),
    \(''backtest'', ''from prediction_agent.backtest.backtest import run_backtest, BacktestReport, _build_formula''\),
    \(''sqlite_store'', ''from prediction_agent.storage.sqlite_store import SQLiteStore, migrate_jsonl_to_sqlite''\),
    \(''core_schemas'', ''from schemas import EventInput, FormulaSpec, ToolOutput, ScoreResult''\),
    \(''lifecycle_mgr'', ''from prediction_agent.evolution.tool_lifecycle_manager import ToolLifecycleManager''\),
]
for name, stmt in tests:
    try:
        exec\(stmt\)
        print\(f''  OK  {name}''\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''  ERR {name}: {e}''\)
        errors.append\(name\)

# Provenance schema check
try:
    from prediction_agent.evolution.schemas import ToolLifecycleRecord, ToolSpec
    r = ToolLifecycleRecord\(tool_name=''t'', namespace=''evolved/v1'', version=3, trigger_run_ids=[''r1'']\)
    assert r.namespace == ''evolved/v1'' and r.version == 3
    s = ToolSpec\(tool_name=''st'', description=''d'', trigger_gap_id=''g1'', trigger_run_ids=[''r1'']\)
    assert s.trigger_gap_id == ''g1''
    print\(''  OK  provenance fields on schemas''\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''  ERR schemas_provenance: {e}''\)
    errors.append\(''schemas_provenance''\)

from config import CORRELATION_REJECTION_THRESHOLD, SQLITE_DB_FILE, BACKTEST_DEFAULT_PRESET, SANDBOX_MAX_MEMORY_MB
print\(f''  OK  config \(corr={CORRELATION_REJECTION_THRESHOLD}, preset={BACKTEST_DEFAULT_PRESET}\)''\)

print\(\)
print\(''PASS'' if not errors else f''FAIL: {errors}''\)
